title: Initialize the C++ project and build system
description: Create the first buildable thinmint C++ project with a simple CMake-based build.
acceptance: Repository has a top-level CMakeLists.txt
A single documented CMake build command succeeds
A main executable entrypoint exists

title: Create the repository layout for engine modules and tests
description: Add the C++ source, header, test, and script directories so later work lands in stable places.
acceptance: Source directories or module folders exist for board, move generation, search, and UCI
Test directories exist for unit and perft coverage
Scripts directory exists for verification helpers

title: Add a single-command verification script
description: Provide one script that the loop can run for validation on every iteration.
acceptance: scripts/verify.sh exists
The script runs tests
The script exits non-zero when validation fails

title: Add a baseline unit test harness and smoke test
description: Create the first passing tests so the loop always has a regression signal.
acceptance: At least one unit test passes
At least one built binary or CLI smoke test exists
Tests run through scripts/verify.sh

title: Define square indexing and coordinate conversion
description: Establish a single square numbering scheme and helpers for algebraic conversion.
acceptance: All 64 squares map deterministically to bit positions
String conversion helpers are covered by tests

title: Define color, piece, and castling-rights representations
description: Add the enums and constants used by board state and move generation.
acceptance: Piece and color values are explicit and test-covered
Castling rights can represent all legal combinations

title: Implement bitboard helper primitives
description: Add low-level bitboard operations used throughout the engine.
acceptance: Helpers exist for set, clear, test, popcount, and least-significant-bit scan
Helpers are unit tested

title: Define compact move encoding with flags
description: Create a compact move format that supports promotions, captures, castling, and en passant.
acceptance: Encoding stores from square, to square, and move flags
Promotion piece type is represented
Encoding helpers are unit tested

title: Define board state using piece and occupancy bitboards
description: Represent every field needed for a legal chess position.
acceptance: Board state stores piece bitboards by color and piece type using fixed-width integer types
Board state stores white, black, and combined occupancy
Board state stores side to move, castling rights, en passant square, and clocks

title: Implement FEN parsing and board invariant checks
description: Load standard FEN strings into the board representation and reject invalid positions.
acceptance: Starting position parses correctly
Castling, side-to-move, en passant, and clocks parse correctly
Malformed FEN input is rejected
Basic board invariants are validated in tests
